response: THE FINAL WEIGHT OF THE FRAME IS \( W \) MULTIPLIED BY \( (0.98)^N \). TO ACHIEVE A 25% REDUCTION IN ENERGY EXPENDITURE, ALEX NEEDS TO SOLVE \( 1 - (0.98)^N \geq 0.25 \), WHICH REQUIRES AT LEAST 125 COMPONENTS. THIS CLOCK IS TICKING. THE CLOCK SHOWS TIME PASSING. ANOTHER CLOCK COUNTS THE SECONDS.
